"[3] ^TRAFFIC ADVISORY CONTINUED IN THE EAST LOS ANGELES AREA: E CESAR E CHAVEZ AVE WILL BE CLOSED FROM HUMPHREYS AVE TO MARIANNA AVE. EASTERN AVE WILL ALSO BE CLOSED FROM DOZIER ST TO NEW YORK ST. CLOSURE WILL REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE DUE TO A TRAFFIC HAZARD. REF LOG: 3070"

"[1] [Address: 1497 PIPER RANCH RD [PILOT TRUCK STOP]] [Medium] [Information] PILOT TRUCK STOP. THIS IS A CHP HANDLE, HOWEVER WE DO NOT HANLDE 11-82'S IN THE TRUCK STOP PARKING LOT. CHP HANDLES ODD SIDE AND SAN DIEGO PD HANDLES EVEN SIDE. (SGT AID SPOKE TO SDPD SGT HEWEY TO CONFIRM JURISDICTION) ******* BEAT 87-018 *******"
